moments.author: Blue Origin / Jeff Bezos
moments.quote: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion valuation — first time we’re taking outside capital.
moments.why: Massive shift: Bezos’ space venture opens to outside investors for first time — ignites space‑business chatter.
moments.url: https://www.forbes.com (via Forbes coverage of Blue Origin funding announcement)

moments.author: SpaceXAI
moments.why: Officially marks the bold merger of Musk’s AI arm into SpaceX, a rebrand lighting up the tech and branding zeitgeist.
moments.url: https://www.engadget.com (via Engadget coverage of xAI rebrand)

moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.why: Personal sign‑off from Musk on the rebrand — adds his stamp to a moment reshaping his AI‑space empire in real time.
moments.url: https://www.timesofindia.com (via Times of India coverage of Musk’s post)
